```{r}
#| echo: false

# correcting weird rotation problem with day length
if ("day1" %in% names(params)) {
  if (params$day1 %in% "Wednesdays") {
    arrow_style1 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: -30px;"
  } else if (params$day1 %in% c("Fridays")) {
    arrow_style1 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: 42px;"
  } else if (params$day1 %in% c("Mondays", "Tuesdays")) {
    arrow_style1 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: 15px;"
  } else {
    arrow_style1 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: 15px;"
  }
  
  if (params$day2 %in% "Wednesdays") {
    arrow_style2 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: -320px;"
  } else if (params$day2 %in% c("Fridays")) {
    arrow_style2 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: -320px;"
  } else if (params$day2 %in% c("Mondays", "Tuesdays")) {
    arrow_style2 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: -320px;"
  } else {
    arrow_style2 <- "transform: rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left; top: 190px; right: -320px;"
  }
  
  arrow_collab <- htmltools::div(
    htmltools::HTML("&larr;"), params$day1, '= Collaborations',
    `data-fragment-index` = "0",
    class = "fragment absolute visible",
    style = arrow_style1)
  
  arrow_milestone <- htmltools::div(
    htmltools::HTML("&larr;"), params$day2, '= Milestones',
    `data-fragment-index` = "1",
    class = "fragment absolute visible",
    style = arrow_style2)
}
```

::::: {.r-vstack}
::: {style="margin-bottom: 1em;"}
The week
:::

:::: {id="curly-brace"}
::: {.brace id="left"}
:::

::: {.brace id="right"}
:::
::::

:::: {.r-hstack}
::: {data-id="box1" auto-animate-delay="0" style="background: #44709a; width: 600px; height: 75px; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center;"}
::: {fragment-index=2}
Working on lessons
:::
:::

::: {data-id="box2" auto-animate-delay="0.1" style="background: #ef6331; width: 400px; height: 75px; color: #FFFFFF; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle;"}
::: {fragment-index=3}
Solving milestones 
:::
:::
:::

::: {.r-hstack}
::: {style="background: #FFFFFF; width: 466px;"}
:::

<!-- ::: {.fragment fragment-index=1 .absolute top="190" right="4" style="transform:rotate(25deg); transform-origin: top left; font-size: 0.7em; text-align: left;"} -->
<!-- &larr; `{r} params$day1` ("Collaborations") -->
<!-- ::: -->

`{r} arrow_collab`

`{r} arrow_milestone`

:::


::: {.fragment fragment-index=3 style="margin-top:3.75em; margin-left: -9em;"}
**4--6 hours** per week<br>
**45--60 minutes** per day
:::
:::::
